Reference Entry by Rack / Bin / Item

Save references like J553G to locations such as 01A01, 01B01, 02A01. Save advances to the next item. Duplicate refs from earlier locations are flagged.

Tray navigation

Reference entry

Type the visible reference number, save it, and the app will move to the next item.

Batch paste

Paste one reference per line. It fills from the current item onward in the current rack/bin and checks duplicates for each line.
